1.issue_title: Set up npm workspaces monorepo structure for WebApps

cycles.name: Monorepo Foundation & Tooling Setup

deliverables.description: Root package.json containing the workspaces configuration

cycles.exit_criteria: Root package.json contains workspaces key. Base tsconfig.json exists. App directories apps/portal, apps/fysiek_fabriek_portal, apps/project_intake_scan, and apps/maatwerk_risico_scan exist.

cycles.name: Migrate Fokus Checklist to apps/project_intake_scan
cycles.exit_criteria: project_intake_scan workspace builds successfully (npm run build --workspace=project_intake_scan) and uses the localStorage key 'project_intake_scan_history'.

cycles.name: Migrate Triage Stoplicht to apps/maatwerk_risico_scan (TSX Conversion)

deliverables.description: MaatwerkRisicoScan component fully converted to TSX and functional

cycles.exit_criteria: maatwerk_risico_scan workspace compiles cleanly with tsc, builds successfully (npm run build --workspace=maatwerk_risico_scan), and uses separate localStorage key 'maatwerk_risico_scan_history'.

cycles.name: Create Nested Portal apps/fysiek_fabriek_portal
cycles.exit_criteria: fysiek_fabriek_portal builds successfully and displays links to intake and risico scans.

cycles.name: Create Main Portal apps/portal (Navy/Peach Styling)

deliverables.description: Main portal landing page with Navy/Peach design
Verification of zero mentions of '1Voudig' in main portal files

cycles.exit_criteria: apps/portal builds successfully with Navy/Peach brand theme colors and contains no mentions of '1Voudig'.

cycles.name: Clean-up and Legacy Code Removal

deliverables.description: Legacy code removal and validation verification

cycles.exit_criteria: Legacy root src/ folder, index.html, and vite.config.js deleted. Root npm run build and npm run lint run cleanly across all workspaces.
